content.rendered:
Golden hour — that magical window just before sunset — is the holy grail of wedding photography. The warm, diffused light flatters every skin tone and wraps the couple in a warm, romantic glow.

In this post, we share our favourite techniques for making the most of those precious 30 minutes: choosing the right aperture, managing lens flare creatively, and posing naturally in fading light.

excerpt.rendered: Tips for capturing stunning golden hour portraits on a wedding day.
